rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. POPE & POPE PROPERTIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Second Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Cross Defendant Vladimir Abramov
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday November 26, 2014, line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT VLADIMIR ABRAMOV's Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Cross Defendant Vladimir Abramov DENIED. Notice of Stay of Proceedings re: Bankruptcy as to Pope & Pope, LLC on file. James Pope, an individual, is not a signatory to the Operating Agreement containing the operative arbitration clause. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KENT N. MIRKHANI et al VS. CROSSROADS TRADING CO. INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended X-Complaint

rulings.Case Title: JOHN MITCHELL VS. THE MITCHELL FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion CAlendar for Wednesday November 26, 2014, line 4. PLAINTIFF JOHN MITCHELL's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden. No opposition filed. Prevailing party is to prepare order and judgment. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. KATHERINE A FONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Approving Receiver'S Final Account And Report, Discharging Receiver, Exonerating Receiver'S Bond, Dissolving Preliminary Injunction, Terminating Receivership And Directing Payment Of Receivership Deficit
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion CAlendar for Wednesday November 26, 2014, line 5. PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Order Approving Receiver's Final Account And Report, Discharging Receiver, Exonerating Receiver's Bond, Dissolving Preliminary Injunction, Terminating Receivership And Directing Payment Of Receivership Deficit. GRANTED. Receiver's account is approved in its entirety; receivership is terminated; preliminary injunction is dissolved; receiver's and plaintiff's bonds are exonerated; plaintiff shall pay to receiver $2,497.93. No opposition filed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PARK LANE ASSOCIATES, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. JOSEPH ALIOTO, AN INDIVIDUAL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Lift Stay And Enforcement Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion CAlendar for Wednesday November 26, 2014, line 6. PLAINTIFF PARK LANE ASSOCIATES, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED's Motion To Lift Stay And Enforcement Judgment GRANTED. The stay is lifted and plaintiff may proceed with the enforcement of judgment. Monthly rent was not received by the plaintiff by the 5th of September as required by Section 8(ii) of the Settlement Agreement. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JCS PROPERTIES LLC VS. EDWARD NOVACK et al

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday November 26, 2014, line 7. DEFENDANT EDWARD NOVACK's Amended Motion To Set Aside Default Judgmemnt DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden. =(501/REQ)
